ClippyCore
Table of Contents

Class Agent

Namespace
ClippyCore.Agents
Assembly
ClippyCore.dll

Base implementation of IAgent. Abstracts the use of AxControl from other clients. To create and dispose of Agents, use public AgentManager. AgentManager

internal class Agent : IAgent
Inheritance
object
Agent
Implements
IAgent

Methods

GetAnimation(byte)

Returns Animation Obj based on its Animations key. Example usage: GetAnimation(Animations.Bonzi.Aknowledge)

public Animation GetAnimation(byte key)

Parameters

key byte

Key of animation in dictionary, as byte.

Returns

Animation

The Animation obj

GetAnimation(string)

Returns animation object based on its name.

public Animation GetAnimation(string animationName)

Parameters

animationName string

Name of the animation obj to return/

Returns

Animation

Desired Animation obj

Exceptions

ArgumentException
KeyNotFoundException

GetAnimationNames()

Get a list of all available animations for the specific agent.

public string[] GetAnimationNames()

Returns

string[]

Animation names as strings in an array.

GetAnimations(bool)

Returns all available Animations for agent as dictionary.

public IDictionary GetAnimations(bool useStringKey = false)

Parameters

useStringKey bool

If true, returns the dictionary with string keys where the key is the animation name.

Returns

IDictionary

Dictionary where values are all Animation objects.

Hide()

Hides the agent from the screen, but is still running in background.

public void Hide()

MoveTo(short, short, int)

Moves agent to specified position. Use this version if knowingly passing 'shorts'. AxControl uses shorts as X,Y arguments natively.

public void MoveTo(short x, short y, int speed = 0)

Parameters

x short

X position relative to 0,0

y short

Y position relative to 0,0

speed int

Speed at which agent moves in miliseconds. 0 is instant.

MoveTo(int, int, int)

Moves agent to specified position. Use this version if using int values, like would be the case when using Screen.PrimaryScreen.Bounds or Windows.Forms Controls or Rectangles

public void MoveTo(int x, int y, int speed = 0)

Parameters

x int

X position relative to 0,0

y int

Y position relative to 0,0

speed int

Speed at which agent moves in miliseconds. 0 is instant.

Play(Animation)

Plays an animation by passing an Animation instance.

public void Play(Animation animation)

Parameters

animation Animation

The Animation

Play(byte)

Play an animation by passing a byte. Example usage: _bonzi.Play(Animations.Bonzi.Aknowledge)

public void Play(byte animationKey)

Parameters

animationKey byte

Play(string)

Plays an animation by passing a string (if you know it). You can call GetAnimationNames() to get a full list of available animations for each agent.

public void Play(string animation)

Parameters

animation string

Name of the animation.

Show()

Shows the agent on the screen.

public void Show()

Speak(Dictionary<string, string>, string)

Make agent speak specific phrase in a dictionary.

public void Speak(Dictionary<string, string> phrases, string key)

Parameters

phrases Dictionary<string, string>

Phrase dictionary.

key string

Key of phrase value to speak

Speak(Dictionary<uint, string>, uint)

Make agent speak specific phrase in a dictionary.

public void Speak(Dictionary<uint, string> phrases, uint key)

Parameters

phrases Dictionary<uint, string>

Phrase dictionary.

key uint

Key of phrase value to speak

Speak(List<string>)

Make the agent say multiple things in sequence. Can be used with Dictionaries of TKey,string by doing phrases.Values.ToList etc...

public void Speak(List<string> phrases)

Parameters

phrases List<string>

List of phrases for the agent to speak, one at a time.

Speak(string)

Makes the agent speak (speech bubble).

public void Speak(string phrase)

Parameters

phrase string

What the agent will say.

Speak(string[])

Make the agent say multiple things in sequence. Can be used with Dictionaries of TKey,string using phrases.Values.ToArray etc...

public void Speak(string[] phrases)

Parameters

phrases string[]

Array of string for the agent to speak.

Stop()

Force stop an Agent animation.

public void Stop()
